note: mutilde-X represents two metaortheme types with DIFFERENT fidelity/stance: faithful+endorses to mu-type-A, distorted+opposes to mu-type-corroboration. This is why fidelity/stance cannot be one global field on the standard.

assessments.scope: X's public teaching of the source-order standard
assessments.uncertainty: faithful on the source-order axis; assessed from the public teaching corpus

assessments.scope: X's use of the corroboration standard
assessments.uncertainty: distorts the corroboration standard by treating apparent count as independence
